'''鈭歝h-n-t-g''' ('''kachantegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flambee|flambee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flambee|flambee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-n-t-g
|-
! Lemma
| kachantegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
